name: empty-avatar
visual_summary: The Empty Avatar UI component displays an empty circle or square representing a user. It can be used when you want to leave space for a user icon without actually displaying one. This can be particularly useful for profile pages, chat heads, or user lists where user presence is important.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready avatar component with the following characteristics:

Name: empty-avatar
Description: The Empty Avatar UI component displays an empty circle or square representing a user. It can be used when you want to leave space for a user icon without actually displaying one. This can be particularly useful for profile pages, chat heads, or user lists where user presence is important.
Style: rounded, square
Interactions: hover
Tags: avatar, icon, user, presence, indicator

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
